subcodes.first_line: Hearken thou unto the call of thy Lord, the All-Merciful, from the horizon of tribulation. Verily, there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Help in Peril. Verily, He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ندآء ربک الرحمن من افق البلاء انه لا اله الا هو العزیز المستعان انه
